domain.title: OrbitOps — 订单到收入运营平台
domain.description: 面向 B2B SaaS 公司的全链路收入运营平台：统一管理客户、合同、订单、订阅、账单、回款、续费、对账、异常处理和外部系统对接，同时支持人工运营和 Agent 自动化操作。

resources.title: 审批请求
resources.description: 由业务操作触发的审批请求（折扣、退款、发票、核销等）。

resources.title: 审计备注
resources.description: 可挂载到任何核心业务资源上的审计备注。

resources.title: 账单发票
resources.description: 向客户开具的服务账单。

resources.title: 商业合同
resources.description: 与客户签订的商业合同。

resources.title: 客户账户
resources.description: 收入运营中管理的客户主体。

resources.title: 客户联系人
resources.description: 客户账户下的联系人。

resources.title: 争议案例
resources.description: 客户发起或代客户发起的账单/支付争议。

resources.title: 异常案例
resources.description: 需要调查和处理的收入运营异常。

resources.title: 集成连接器
resources.description: 与外部系统（Salesforce、Stripe、NetSuite、HubSpot）的连接配置。

resources.title: 成员
resources.description: 工作空间中的用户成员及其角色。

resources.title: Organization Membership
resources.description: A link between one user and one organization.

resources.title: Organization
resources.description: A tenant container that scopes work inside the application.

resources.title: 回款记录
resources.description: 针对发票的回款记录。

resources.title: 价格计划
resources.description: 挂在产品目录项下的定价方案。

resources.title: 产品目录
resources.description: 可售产品或服务。

resources.title: 对账案例
resources.description: 跨订单、订阅、发票、回款的收入对账案例。

resources.title: 退款申请
resources.description: 关联发票或回款的退款申请。

resources.title: 续费活动
resources.description: 管理即将到期订阅续费的活动。

resources.title: 续费机会
resources.description: 续费活动中的单个续费机会。

resources.title: Role
resources.description: An authorization role assignable to authenticated operators.

resources.title: 销售订单
resources.description: 从合同或直接销售发起的订单。

resources.title: 订单行项
resources.description: 销售订单中的明细行。

resources.title: 服务订阅
resources.description: 客户的有效订阅，关联价格计划和来源订单。

resources.title: 同步任务
resources.description: 集成连接器的单次同步执行记录。

resources.title: User
resources.description: An authenticated user who can operate the application.

resources.title: Work Request
resources.description: A durable workflow request that can be reviewed and completed over time.

resources.title: 工作空间
resources.description: 租户下的工作空间，代表一条业务线、区域或运营团队。

tasks.title: Activate Sales Order Task
tasks.description: 从已完成的销售订单激活对应的订阅服务。

tasks.title: Collect Billing Invoice Task
tasks.description: 对逾期或未付发票进行催收。

tasks.title: Decide Approval Request Task
tasks.description: 处理审批请求：批准或拒绝，可附加意见。

tasks.title: Launch Renewal Campaign Task
tasks.description: 从符合条件的订阅中批量生成续费机会。

tasks.title: Manage Service Subscription Task
tasks.description: 管理订阅生命周期：暂停、恢复、取消。

tasks.title: Process Refund Request Task
tasks.description: 处理退款申请：校验、审批、执行退款。

tasks.title: Process Work Request Task
tasks.description: Durably processes one work request through review and completion.

tasks.title: Reconcile Reconciliation Case Task
tasks.description: 对指定期间的收入进行对账。

tasks.title: Resolve Exception Case Task
tasks.description: 调查并处理异常案例，支持人工输入和审批。

tasks.title: Review Customer Account Task
tasks.description: 全面审查客户健康状况、订阅、发票与续费风险。

tasks.title: Sync Integration Connection Task
tasks.description: 触发此集成连接器的数据同步。

policies.title: Approval Request Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before decide may continue for one approval request.

policies.title: Authenticated Access
policies.description: Allows access only for authenticated operators.

policies.title: Billing Invoice Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before collect may continue for one billing invoice.

policies.title: Customer Account Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before review may continue for one customer account.

policies.title: Dispute Case Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before resolve may continue for one dispute case.

policies.title: Exception Case Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before resolve may continue for one exception case.

policies.title: Integration Connection Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before sync may continue for one integration connection.

policies.title: Reconciliation Case Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before reconcile may continue for one reconciliation case.

policies.title: Refund Request Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before process may continue for one refund request.

policies.title: Renewal Campaign Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before launch may continue for one renewal campaign.

policies.title: Sales Order Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before activate may continue for one sales order.

policies.title: Service Subscription Approval Required
policies.description: Requires approval before manage may continue for one service subscription.

policies.title: Tenant Scoped Access
policies.description: Allows access only when a request is correctly scoped to one tenant.

policies.title: Work Request Approval Required
policies.description: Requires explicit approval before work request processing may continue.

artifacts.title: 审批决定记录
artifacts.description: A generated record artifact produced after decide completes.

artifacts.title: 客户健康快照
artifacts.description: A generated report artifact produced after review completes.

artifacts.title: 争议解决报告
artifacts.description: A generated report artifact produced after resolve completes.

artifacts.title: 异常处理摘要
artifacts.description: A generated report artifact produced after resolve completes.

artifacts.title: 发票催收回执
artifacts.description: A generated record artifact produced after collect completes.

artifacts.title: 退款执行回执
artifacts.description: A generated record artifact produced after process completes.

artifacts.title: 续费风险摘要
artifacts.description: A generated report artifact produced after launch completes.

artifacts.title: 收入对账报告
artifacts.description: A generated report artifact produced after reconcile completes.

artifacts.title: 订单激活回执
artifacts.description: A generated record artifact produced after activate completes.

artifacts.title: 订阅生命周期记录
artifacts.description: A generated record artifact produced after manage completes.

artifacts.title: 同步健康报告
artifacts.description: A generated report artifact produced after sync completes.

artifacts.title: Work Request Report
artifacts.description: A generated report artifact produced when one work request finishes processing.
